name: Baked Lemon Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken breasts to an even thickness.
2. Dredge each breast in flour, shaking off excess.
3. Melt butter in a baking pan over medium heat.
4. Coat the chicken on all sides, turning skin side up if not boneless.
5. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes, brushing with pan drippings.
6. Meanwhile, mix together lemon juice, minced onion, garlic, salt, and pepper to make the basting sauce.
7. Brush one-third of the basting sauce over the chicken.
8. Continue baking for an additional 30 minutes or until done.
9. Serve with rice and a vegetable.
